message.content:
@startuml
title OAuth2 Authorization Code Grant Workflow\nwith SAML2 Post Binding for user provisioning

participant "HealthCloud" as HC1 #90EE90
participant "Embedded Browser" as EB1 #3CB371
rectangle HealthSphere {
    participant "Apigee Edge" as AE1 #FFD700
}
rectangle Orion_Health_Platform {
    participant "Orion Health Platform" as OHP1 #FFFFE0
}

HC1 -> EB1 : 
EB1 ->> AE1 : GET /authorize?response_type=code
AE1 --> EB1 : 302 https://<redirect_url>\n(SAML OR token)

frame SAMLAUTH [SAML Authentication] {
    note over HC1,OHP1
    
endnote
    EB1 ->> AE1 : POST /oauth/saml
    activate AE1
        AE1 ->> OHP1 : POST /login-auth/saml?path=/actor/current
        activate OHP1
            loop Verify SAMLResponse
                OHP1 <-OHP1:  
            endloop
        deactivate OHP1
        
        return Generate authorization code
    deactivate AE1
    AE1 <-- EB1 : 302 https://<redirect_url>?code=<code>
    
end frame


' Final Token Exchange Step - Outside Frame but still part of flow
activate HC1
   ' Note right of HC1: This step happens after successful authentication above
   
     HC1->>AE1:POST /token?code=<code>
      activate AE1
      
       alt Success Response Received From Server Side Processing Done By Now Already Completed Earlier Steps Above Successfully Executed Without Any Errors Occurring During Execution Process Flow
